message:
test(conformance): add transform composition oracle fixture and parity test

Add composition_oracle.v1.json with hand-verified expected values for
grad-of-grad, vmap-of-grad, jit-of-vmap, and scan-with-grad transform
compositions. Add composition_oracle_parity.rs test runner that loads
fixtures, dispatches through the transform API, and asserts numerical
agreement within configured tolerance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
